headline: Fastenal AGM: Directors Elected, Pay Plans Approved, EEO-1 Disclosure Proposal Rejected Amid CEO Transition
summary: Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) shareholders elected directors, approved several compensation-related plans, and rejected a shareholder proposal tied to workforce demographic reporting at the company’s 2026 annual meeting, where executives also reviewed 2025 performance and discussed a planned leadership tra
